title: COSHH data sheets available on site?
source_flagged_item: COSHH: COSHH data sheets available on site? Context: COSHH data sheets were not found on site during the inspection. This presents a significant risk, as staff are unable to quickly reference important information regarding hazardous substances. Without accessible COSHH data sheets, safe handling, correct storage, and effective emergency responses are compromised. To ensure compliance and maintain a safe working environment, all COSHH data sheets must be obtained, kept up to date, and stored in a clearly accessible location for all staff.

title: COSHH data sheets available on site?
source_flagged_item: COSHH: COSHH data sheets available on site? Context: The absence of COSHH safety data sheets during the inspection raises significant concerns regarding the management and communication of hazardous substances on site. Without accessible documentation, staff may not have the necessary information to handle materials safely, increasing the risk of improper storage, usage, or emergency response. Immediate action is recommended to ensure all relevant safety data sheets are readily available and up to date.

title: COSHH data sheets available on site?
source_flagged_item: Items are received at the rear fire door and taken up some stairs to the stockroom. A lift is also blocked at the top next to the stockroom. Near the fire door, pallets and consumables are stacked, which restricts the safe width during an evacuation. The stacked items could create trip hazards and make it difficult for staff to manoeuvre safely, especially when carrying stock. Blocked access to the lift and narrow escape routes could delay a rapid exit in an emergency, increasing the risk of injury. Visibility around the fire door is also reduced, making it harder to identify potential hazards quickly. Regular checks and clear pathways are essential to prevent accidents and ensure safe evacuation. COSHH COSHHdatasheets available on site?
